mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND rm.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND rm.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''
